case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. CAVALIER TRANSPORT, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVALIER TRANSPORT, LLC AKA CAVALIER TRANSPORT LLC $8,320.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,064.63 INTEREST, $268.17 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,827.80, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
